segments.original_text: さあ念願スピン通りましたね

segments.text: Yeah, when that spin lands the damage just shoots up!
segments.original_text: やはりスピンが通ると火力一気に伸びますね

segments.text: Now the spin's starting to work!
segments.original_text: ここに来てスピンが通り出した

full_text: And the spin finally connects! Yeah, when that spin lands the damage just shoots up! Alright! That nair is looking great! Now the spin's starting to work! The juggle...

corrections.original: 空中ネムが偉いですね
corrections.rule: Move abbreviation correction (空中ネム → 空N)

corrections.original: アクシガリがようこそ
corrections.rule: Kanji homophone correction (アクシガリ → 着地狩り)
